name: create_task_defs
description: Creates task definitions from analyze_objective specs. Supports both Python tasks (with executable code) and LLM tasks (with Jinja2 prompt templates). Persists each to the database.

inputs.name: skill_name
inputs.description: Name of the skill being built

outputs.name: created_task_ids
outputs.description: IDs of all created task definitions

outputs.name: task_id_map
outputs.description: Map from task name to task ID

preconditions.description: Generates and executes code via LLM

code:
import json
import uuid
import sys
import re

def execute(inputs):
    """Create task definitions — supports both Python and LLM task types."""
    task_definitions = inputs.get('task_definitions', [])
    if isinstance(task_definitions, str):
        task_definitions = json.loads(task_definitions)
    edges = inputs.get('edges', [])
    if isinstance(edges, str):
        edges = json.loads(edges)
    
    created_task_ids = []
    task_id_map = {}
    
    for task_spec in task_definitions:
        task_name = task_spec.get('name', 'unnamed_task')
        task_id = f"{task_name}_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}"
        task_desc = task_spec.get('description', task_name)
        task_type = task_spec.get('task_type', 'llm')
        task_inputs_spec = task_spec.get('inputs', [])
        task_outputs_spec = task_spec.get('outputs', [])
        task_code = task_spec.get('code', '')
        
        task_data = {
            'id': task_id,
            'name': task_name,
            'description': task_desc,
            'task_type': task_type,
            'inputs': task_inputs_spec,
            'outputs': task_outputs_spec,
            'risk_level': task_spec.get('risk_level', 'low'),
            'toolkit_refs': task_spec.get('toolkit_refs', []),
            'tags': [task_name],
            'version': 1
        }
        
        if task_type == 'python' and task_code:
            # Python task with provided code
            task_data['code'] = task_code
            task_data['test_code'] = task_spec.get('test_code', '')
            print(f"  [create_task_defs] Created PYTHON task: '{task_name}'", file=sys.stderr)
        else:
            # LLM task — build Jinja2 prompt template
            task_data['task_type'] = 'llm'
            prompt_template = task_spec.get('prompt_template', '')
            if prompt_template:
                # Fix Python format strings {var} to Jinja2 {{ var }}
                prompt_template = re.sub(
                    r'(?<!\{)\{([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\}(?!\})',
                    r'{{ \1 }}',
                    prompt_template
                )
            else:
                # Auto-generate from I/O specs
                input_lines = []
                for inp in task_inputs_spec:
                    iname = inp.get('name', 'input')
                    idesc = inp.get('description', '')
                    input_lines.append(f"- {iname}: {{{{ {iname} | default('(not provided)', true) }}}}")
                    if idesc:
                        input_lines.append(f"  Description: {idesc}")
                
                output_lines = []
                for out in task_outputs_spec:
                    oname = out.get('name', 'output')
                    otype = out.get('io_type', 'string')
                    odesc = out.get('description', '')
                    output_lines.append(f'- \"{oname}\" ({otype}): {odesc}')
                
                inputs_section = '\n'.join(input_lines) if input_lines else '(No inputs)'
                outputs_section = '\n'.join(output_lines) if output_lines else '(Free-form)'
                
                prompt_template = (
                    f"You are performing the following task:\n\n"
                    f"TASK: {task_desc}\n\n"
                    f"INPUTS:\n{inputs_section}\n\n"
                    f"REQUIRED OUTPUTS (respond as JSON with EXACTLY these keys):\n{outputs_section}\n\n"
                    f"Respond with ONLY valid JSON containing the required output keys."
                )
            
            task_data['prompt_template'] = prompt_template
            task_data['system_instruction'] = 'You are a helpful assistant. Always respond with valid JSON only, using exactly the output keys requested.'
            print(f"  [create_task_defs] Created LLM task: '{task_name}'", file=sys.stderr)
        
        print(f"    Desc: {task_desc[:80]}", file=sys.stderr)
        
        from db_access import save_task
        save_task(task_data)
        created_task_ids.append(task_id)
        task_id_map[task_name] = task_id
    
    # Resolve edges
    resolved_edges = []
    for edge in edges:
        src = edge.get('source_task_name', '')
        tgt = edge.get('target_task_name', '')
        resolved_edges.append({
            'source_node_id': task_id_map.get(src, src),
            'target_node_id': task_id_map.get(tgt, tgt),
            'output_mapping': edge.get('output_mapping', {}),
            'data_policy': edge.get('data_policy', 'pass_through')
        })
    
    skill_name = inputs.get('skill_name', '?')
    print(f"  [create_task_defs] Total: {len(created_task_ids)} tasks for skill '{skill_name}'", file=sys.stderr)
    
    return {
        'created_task_ids': created_task_ids,
        'task_id_map': task_id_map,
        'edges': resolved_edges,
        'skill_name': inputs.get('skill_name', ''),
        'skill_description': inputs.get('skill_description', ''),
        'tags': inputs.get('tags', [])
    }

outputs = execute(inputs)
